description: 22-question SAT Math timed-test module — practice version 3. Mirrors the digital-SAT Module 1 structure: 22 questions, 35 minutes, Desmos calculator allowed.

answerFormat.MC: options is array of 4 strings. correct is 0-indexed integer.
answerFormat.SPR: correctAnswer is the canonical string answer. UI should normalize student input.
answerFormat.diagram: Optional SVG string. Frontend should render above question text when present.

questions.question: A taxi charges $4 base fare plus $3 per mile. If a passenger paid $22, how many miles was the ride?
The line y = -2x + 9 is graphed in the xy-plane. What is the y-intercept of the line?
questions.explanation: In y = mx + b form, the y-intercept is b. Here b = 9, so the y-intercept is at (0, 9), value 9.

questions.question: If 3x + 2y = 17 and x + 2y = 9, what is the value of x?
questions.explanation: Subtract the second equation from the first: 2x = 8, so x = 4.

questions.question: A student has $45 to spend on books that each cost $8. What is the maximum number of books the student can buy?
questions.explanation: 8b ≤ 45, so b ≤ 5.625. Since b must be a whole number, the max is 5 books.

questions.question: If 5(x - 3) = 2x + 9, what is the value of x?
What is the slope of the line passing through the points (2, 5) and (6, 13)?

A gym membership costs $25 per month plus a one-time $50 initiation fee. The total cost T after m months is T = 25m + 50. If a member has paid a total of $325, how many months have they been a member?
What are the solutions to x² + 3x - 10 = 0?
The parabola y = x² - 6x + 13 has its vertex at which point?
questions.explanation: Complete the square: y = (x² - 6x + 9) + 13 - 9 = (x - 3)² + 4. Vertex is (3, 4).

questions.question: A radioactive substance loses half its mass every 5 years. If a sample has 80 grams now, how much will remain after 15 years?
If g(x) = 2x² - 3x + 1, what is the value of g(-3)?
If (x + 4)(x - 2) = x² + bx - 8, what is the value of b?
Which expression is equivalent to (x⁷)/(x³) for x ≠ 0?
How many real solutions does the equation x² + 4x + 4 = 0 have?
questions.explanation: Discriminant = b² - 4ac = 16 - 16 = 0. When the discriminant is 0, there is exactly one real solution (a repeated root).

questions.question: A laptop is on sale for 30% off its original price of $650. What is the sale price?
A car travels 240 miles in 4 hours. At this rate, how far will the car travel in 7 hours?
questions.explanation: Rate = 240/4 = 60 mph. Distance in 7 hours = 60 × 7 = 420 miles.

questions.question: A data set contains the values 4, 7, 11, 9, 6, 14, 8. What is the median of this data set?
questions.explanation: Sorted: 4, 6, 7, 8, 9, 11, 14. With 7 values, the median is the 4th value: 8.

questions.question: The ratio of cats to dogs to rabbits in a shelter is 5:3:2. If there are 60 animals in total, how many are cats?
In a triangle, two angles measure 55° and 80°. What is the measure, in degrees, of the third angle?
questions.explanation: Angles of a triangle sum to 180°. Third angle = 180 - 55 - 80 = 45°.

questions.question: A circle has a diameter of 14. What is its circumference?
Two similar triangles have corresponding sides in the ratio 2:5. If the smaller triangle has a side of length 8, what is the length of the corresponding side in the larger triangle?
In right triangle ABC, the right angle is at C, AB = 13, and BC = 5. What is the value of sin A?
questions.diagram:
<svg viewBox="0 0 300 240" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <!-- Triangle -->
  <polygon points="60,200 252,200 60,120" fill="#FDF5EA" stroke="#2E2A25" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- Right-angle marker at C -->
  <path d="M 60 188 L 72 188 L 72 200" fill="none" stroke="#2E2A25" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- Vertex labels -->
  <text x="40" y="218" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="15" font-style="italic" fill="#2E2A25">C</text>
  <text x="258" y="218" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="15" font-style="italic" fill="#2E2A25">A</text>
  <text x="40" y="115" font-family="Georgia, serif" font-size="15" font-style="italic" fill="#2E2A25">B</text>

  <!-- Side labels (only the ones given in the problem) -->
  <text x="35" y="165" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#C4602A">5</text>
  <text x="165" y="150" font-family="Arial, sans-serif" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#C4602A">13</text>
</svg>
